common.broadenSearch: Broaden your search or reset the filters to recover the full register.

dashboard.title: Risk overview
dashboard.subtitle: Indicators, distributions and likelihood × severity matrix. ISO 45001 framework.
dashboard.emptyDescription: The overview populates automatically as soon as risks are recorded in the register.
dashboard.matrixCaption: Each cell shows the number of risks positioned on the corresponding combination.

register.title: Risk register
register.subtitle: Catalogue of identified HSE risks: context, owners and treatment tracking
register.searchPlaceholder: Search for a risk, a hazard source, an owner…
register.loadFailed: Failed to load the risk register
register.emptyDescription: Identify your site's first HSE risk to populate the register.
register.broadenSearchFull: Broaden your search or reset the filters to recover the full register.

registerForm.title: Identify a risk
registerForm.subtitle: Describe the scenario, the hazard source and the person responsible for follow-up
registerForm.sectionIdentificationSub: The observed scenario and its credible consequences
registerForm.sectionContextSub: Where the risk is located and who follows it up
registerForm.descriptionPlaceholder: What happens or could happen: triggering conditions, locations, equipment involved
registerForm.hazardSourcePlaceholder: e.g. Mobile equipment moving near pedestrians in the loading area
registerForm.consequencesPlaceholder: Credible effects: injury, operations shutdown, environmental impact
registerForm.cardDescriptionPlaceholder: The description you enter will appear here, as the HSE teams will read it.
registerForm.isoReference: ISO 45001 · 6.1.2 — Hazard identification and risk assessment
registerForm.hint: Once the risk is saved, run a first assessment (likelihood × severity) from its detail sheet to position it on the matrix.

editRegisterForm.title: Edit risk
editRegisterForm.subtitle: Update the scenario, the context and the treatment status
editRegisterForm.sectionContextSub: Assignment, treatment status and next review
editRegisterForm.loadFailed: The risk could not be loaded
editRegisterForm.hint: Changes are visible immediately on the register and the overview. The risk's assessment history is preserved.

assessment.title: Risk assessment
assessment.subtitle: Risks rated on the likelihood × severity matrix and reassessment tracking
assessment.loadFailed: Failed to load the assessed risks
assessment.emptyDescription: Risks appear here as soon as a first likelihood × severity assessment is recorded from their sheet.
assessment.broadenSearchList: Broaden your search or reset the filters to recover the full list.

assessmentTab.sectionRatingSub: The risk level is calculated automatically from the likelihood and the severity
assessmentTab.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Incident of 12 May, process change, audit finding
assessmentTab.sectionControlSub: Controls in place and improvement plan
assessmentTab.currentControlsPlaceholder: e.g. Area marking, spotter during manoeuvres, 20 km/h speed limit instruction
assessmentTab.additionalControlPlaceholder: Measures to put in place to reduce the residual risk
assessmentTab.preventivePlaceholder: Preventive actions to undertake (training, signage, maintenance…)
assessmentTab.improvementsPlaceholder: Improvements to the existing control system
assessmentTab.commentsPlaceholder: Approvals, points of vigilance, follow-up actions
assessmentTab.saveFailed: The assessment could not be saved

isoControl.title: Risk control: hierarchy of controls (ISO 45001 §8.1.2)
isoControl.subtitle: Favour the most effective measures first, PPE as the last resort
isoControl.note: Structured entry by hierarchy level and residual risk are coming in a future step.

validate.reason: The reason for reassessment is required
validate.currentControls: The current control measures are required

readLevel.title: Read the calculated level
readLevel.item1: Low and low to moderate: acceptable risk, to be monitored within the normal cycle.
readLevel.item2: Moderate: tolerable risk subject to a tracked action plan.
readLevel.item3: High and critical: priority treatment, additional measures mandatory.

rateProbability.title: Rate the likelihood
rateProbability.item1: Rare: conceivable only in exceptional circumstances.
rateProbability.item2: Possible: could occur during the production cycle.
rateProbability.item3: Almost certain: expected if nothing changes under current conditions.

rateGravity.title: Rate the severity
rateGravity.item2: Moderate: medical care required, short-term absence.

documentControl.title: Document the controls
documentControl.item1: List existing measures: collective protection, PPE, instructions.
documentControl.item2: Proposed measures must have an owner and a deadline.
documentControl.item3: Reassess after any incident, process change or audit finding.

detailView.subtitle: Risk summary, assessment history and new assessment
detailView.locked: Assessments are locked: this risk is at status “{{status}}”.
detailView.loadFailed: The risk could not be loaded
detailView.loadAssessmentsFailed: Failed to load the assessment history

overview.noAssessment: No assessment recorded. Use “New assessment” to rate this risk.
overview.defaultNorm: ISO 45001 · 6.1.2 — Hazard identification and risk assessment

history.emptyDescription: The successive ratings of the risk will appear here, from the most recent to the oldest.

chemicalRegister.title: Chemical register
chemicalRegister.subtitle: Inventory of chemical products and assessment of associated risks, according to the GHS classification
chemicalRegister.loadFailed: Failed to load the chemical register
chemicalRegister.matrixSubtitle: Each cell shows the number of chemical risks positioned on the corresponding combination.
chemicalRegister.searchPlaceholder: Search for a product, a CAS no., an owner…
chemicalRegister.emptyDescription: Identify the first hazardous chemical product handled on the site.

chemicalForm.title: Identify a chemical risk
chemicalForm.subtitle: Describe the product, its GHS hazard class and the exposure scenario
chemicalForm.sectionContextSub: Where the product is handled and who is accountable for the risk
chemicalForm.sectionProductSub: Product identification as shown on the safety data sheet
chemicalForm.methodOfUsePlaceholder: e.g. Dilution in a closed tank for ore processing, twice per shift
chemicalForm.sectionDescriptionSub: The exposure scenario and its credible consequences
chemicalForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Who is exposed, during which task and under what conditions
chemicalForm.consequencesPlaceholder: Possible effects on health, safety or the environment
chemicalForm.savedToast: Chemical risk added to the register
chemicalForm.cardDescriptionPlaceholder: The risk description will appear here, as the HSE teams will read it.
chemicalForm.hint: Once the risk is saved, run a first assessment (likelihood × severity) from its detail sheet to position it on the matrix.

validate.methodOfUse: The method of use is required

editChemicalForm.title: Edit chemical risk
editChemicalForm.subtitle: Update the product sheet, the exposure scenario and the treatment status
editChemicalForm.sectionProductSubEdit: To be checked against the latest safety data sheet
editChemicalForm.methodOfUsePlaceholderEdit: How the product is applied or transformed today
editChemicalForm.loadFailed: The chemical risk could not be loaded
editChemicalForm.hint: Changes are visible immediately on the register and the matrix. The risk's assessment history is preserved.

chemicalAssessmentForm.currentControlsPlaceholder: e.g. Storage in ventilated containment, wearing an ABEK mask and nitrile gloves
chemicalAssessmentForm.preventivePlaceholder: Preventive actions to undertake (training, signage, substitution…)

chemicalDetail.subtitle: Risk summary, assessment history and new assessment
chemicalDetail.locked: Assessments are locked: this risk is at status “{{status}}”.
chemicalDetail.loadFailed: The chemical risk could not be loaded
chemicalDetail.loadAssessmentsFailed: Failed to load the assessment history

fillRating.title: Fill in the rating
fillRating.tip1: On reassessment, specify the trigger: incident, audit finding, process change.
fillRating.tip2: Severity reflects the seriousness of the possible consequences. Rely on the safety data sheet.
fillRating.tip3: Likelihood reflects the probability of an exposure, based on task frequency and the measures in place.
fillRating.tip4: The risk level is calculated automatically from the likelihood × severity combination.

readLevel.title: Read the calculated level
readLevel.tip1: Low and low to moderate: acceptable risk, to be monitored within the normal cycle.
readLevel.tip2: Moderate: tolerable risk subject to a tracked action plan.
readLevel.tip3: High and critical: priority treatment, additional measures mandatory.

documentControl.title: Document the controls
documentControl.tip1: List existing measures: collective protection, PPE, exposure monitoring.
documentControl.tip2: Proposed measures must be concrete, with an owner and a deadline.
documentControl.tip3: Consider substituting the product before personal protection measures.

beforeValidate.title: Before validating
beforeValidate.tip1: Note in the comments the approvals obtained and the actions still to follow up.
beforeValidate.tip2: Reassess the risk as soon as the product, the process or the exposure frequency changes.
